svg.title: Message lifecycle v5 — backend as source of truth
svg.desc: Swimlane diagram: client, backend owns all DB reads/writes including intent scoring, AI module is stateless, external DB at same level as backend.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the mobile app send?')
sendPrompt('What does the web app send?')
sendPrompt('What fields are in the POST /chat payload?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis cache speed up history retrieval?')
sendPrompt('What does message_handler do before and after calling the AI?')
sendPrompt('What does chat() receive and what does it return?')
sendPrompt('How does input_memory append the user turn?')
sendPrompt('How does ChromaDB similarity search work?')
sendPrompt('What does MARBERT return from intent classification?')
sendPrompt('How does build_template assemble the prompt?')
sendPrompt('What does Nile-Chat-4B return to message_handler?')
sendPrompt('What does the backend persist after getting the AI response?')
sendPrompt('How does the backend compute the rolling intent score average?')
